raw.subject: Lone Star Towing in Sterling Heights; Something I noticed about the photos you share
raw.body:
Hi,

Your photos of the Marble Falls area are amazing. I can tell you have a real connection with the community.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet - for a business that's always open and ready to help with lockouts, jump starts, and more, having a central place for customers to find you could make a big difference.

I thought about your Facebook posts and sketched out a simple homepage idea that puts your services front and center, makes it easy to see the work you've done in the area, and gives people a clear way to book an appointment.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/lone-star-towing-inc-sterling-heights

I'd love to discuss how to bring this idea to life with a flat fee for local businesses - would you be up for a quick call to chat more about it?

Reply to this email to schedule a time that works for you.
